_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Only use pre-existing database model fields verified against schema.prisma.
Ensure strict compliance with all model relations, enums, and required values.
Leave all image and document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel.

project.name: Sikka Kimaantra Greens
project.address: Plot No. SC-01/D1, Sector 79, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201305
project.tagline: Thematic Zen Gardens and Premium Ready Living
project.description: A physically completed ready-to-move-in luxury society in Sector 79, offering premium specifications but facing slow registries due to developer dues.
project.long_description: Sikka Kimaantra Greens represents a premium residential development by Sikka Group situated on 5 acres in Sector 79's Sports City. The project comprises 4 high-rise towers rising G+24 floors with 384 units. Featuring beautiful Zen-thematic gardens, double-height entrance foyers, and massive Vastu-compliant 3 and 4 BHK layouts, the project delivers exceptional physical comfort. While the construction is 100% physically complete and occupied by hundreds of families since April 2024, registrations are slow due to Sikka Group's outstanding land lease dues to the Noida Authority, requiring specialized individual NOC clearances.
marketing_claims: Just 2 km from Sector 79 Metro station
All corner apartments with extensive views
ai_search_keywords: ready to move flats sports city
project.project_risk_flag: Moderate: Sikka Group has heavy outstanding land lease dues. Registries are slow and require specialized individual tower NOC clearances.
registry_embargo_reasons: Pending developer payment clearances to Noida Authority.

builder.name: Sikka Group
builder.tagline: Building trust and delivery over three decades
builder.company_overview: Sikka Group (flagship G S Promoters) is a legacy real estate developer in Delhi NCR, established in 1986. The developer holds a large portfolio of commercial and residential townships across Ghaziabad, Noida, and Greater Noida West. While their physical execution and designs (often partnering with CP Kukreja) are premium, they carry high debt gearing leading to payment delays to regional authorities.

unit_types.name: 3 BHK + Study
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious family layout with study room
unit_types.description: Premium 3 BHK layout optimized for maximum ventilation, corner rooms, and wide balconies, featuring a dedicated work/study alcove.

unit_types.name: 4 BHK (Royal)
unit_types.subtitle: Palatial 4.5 BHK with separate servant room
unit_types.description: Flagship royal layout featuring imported marble floorings, modular kitchens with chimneys, and a spacious servant room with service entry.
whats_included: Imported Italian marble in living room
Pre-fitted split air conditioning copper ductings

connectivity.name: Noida Sector 101 Metro Station (Aqua Line)
connectivity.notes: Aqua line metro station connecting to Central Noida

assumptions: Physically completed ready-to-move project, exempting buyers from GST (0%).
Registries are slow; buyers must confirm specific tower NOCs prior to executing sub-lease agreements.

milestones.due: On sub-lease execution and NOC clearing

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Sikka Kimaantra Greens is a physically complete, ready-to-move-in luxury society in Sector 79, offering spacious thematic Zen apartments but facing registry delays due to Sikka's regional financial dues.
why_buy: Physically completed: towers are 100% complete with families already living inside.
Spacious, premium specifications: beautiful Zen landscaping, Italian marble floor options, and wide corner balconies.
High-tech security with video intercoms and fully operational clubhouse.
why_avoid: Registries are slow and partially frozen due to Sikka Group's outstanding land lease dues.
Limited immediate options for traditional bank financing depending on the specific tower NOC status.
decision_profile.best_for: Mid-to-premium end-users who want completed luxury structures and have a 1-2 year registry patience timeline.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Rushed buyers requiring immediate registry execution or highly conservative bank-financed buyers.

persona_profile.motivation_note: Seeking ready-to-occupy physically premium flats with a slight price cushion to offset registry clearance periods.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: A solid 'Buy with Caution' project. Physically, Sikka Kimaantra Greens is a masterpiece of design with high-end finishes, Zen-thematic landscaping, and very spacious 3/4 BHK layouts. However, Sikka Group's outstanding land dues have caused registry gridlocks.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Exceptional physical ready-to-move homes. High-end clubhouse, swimming pool, and pristine gardens make daily living highly pleasant.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: A defensive long-term hold; resolving the registry bottleneck under Noida's 2026 Sports City policy will trigger instant capital appreciation.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Perfect for children and elder care. Safe gated systems and clean interior walking paths.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Strong rental appeal from premium corporate tenants who prioritize lifestyle and metro access over ownership registries.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Very premium specifications including modular kitchens, chimney systems, and pre-fitted split AC lines.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: No construction risk. Project is physically completed with on-site handovers done since April 2024.
walk_away_conditions: Any outstanding builder-level hypothecation on the specific flat inventory.
Sellers demanding premium pricing without providing clear bipartite sub-lease draft copies.
negotiation_leverage: Use Sikka's high-leverage outstanding land dues to negotiate hard on the final pricing with motivated resale sellers.
Highlight the registry delay and mortgage issues to secure a 10-15% discount on market rates.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Buy only if the per-sqft rate is under ₹10,500/sqft and you can manage a delayed registration timeline.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Larger, more modular configurations in 4 BHK types; slightly more modern club amenities.
competitors.competitor_advantage: 100% clear titles, instant registries, and zero legal disputes.
competitors.verdict: Civitech wins on legal safety and immediate registry; Sikka wins on larger layouts and modern specifications.
